forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely later tonight. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending westerly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeasterly in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Light winds.
Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 12:10pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending west to northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely later this evening. The chance of a thunderstorm. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the early morning. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers west of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Ceduna. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, slight chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower south of Streaky Bay, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, slight chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Ceduna. High chance of showers east of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely later this evening. The chance of a thunderstorm. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the east coast, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm early this evening. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers east of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Coober Pedy. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog east of Stuart Highway. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Coober Pedy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers about the Gammon Ranges, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Leigh Creek in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Leigh Creek. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.
